privileged_info_summary: The task 'rotate_90_clockwise@1' downloads a real 800×533 JPEG flower image from Unsplash (photo-1441974231531) as primary data. This image is non-square, making rotation effects easily verifiable. The fallback Unsplash URL (photo-1518709268805) no longer exists (404 error). The task includes a synthetic image fallback (600×400 pixels with labeled directional elements) created via ImageMagick if both Unsplash downloads fail. The verifier checks three success criteria: dimension swap (width and height exchange), SSIM-based rotation verification (≥0.95 similarity to reference), and meaningful image modification. A 75% score (3 out of 4 criteria) is required to pass. Task timeout is 60 seconds with maximum 10 steps. Critical issue: verifier imports missing module 'verification_utils' which will cause runtime failure.
